run_summary.summary:
Two updates from the Apr 15 afternoon scan:

🎉 **Whisker approved** — content got a minor flag (voiceover said 'Litter-Robot 5' instead of 'Litter-Robot 5 Pro') but Liz re-recorded same day and Cheyenne signed off. Liz confirmed posting early next week; Cheyenne said yes. Moving to Scheduled — invoice is right around the corner.

📋 **xTool is a new one** — Laura from xTool (Makeblock) pitched a gifted collab for their xTool P3 80W CO2 laser system (~$10K product value). Liz replied this morning asking about deliverables and whether there's a paid budget. No response yet. Created the card since the product value far clears the $500 gifted threshold — and Liz is already engaged.

suggestions.message: Content is approved and Cheyenne greenlit early next week — get that Litter-Robot 5 Pro reel posted Monday or Tuesday (Apr 20-21) and you're straight to invoicing. 💸

Liz asked Laura about paid budget and deliverables — if no reply by Apr 18 give her a nudge. Even if it ends up gifted-only, a $10K CO2 laser system is serious product value and could make for great content.

Liz followed up on both Apr 14 after 18+ days of silence (rates sent, no response). Might be worth setting a mental deadline — if neither brand responds by end of this week, consider moving them to stalled so the board stays clean.

deals.notes: [Apr 15]: Content approved by Cheyenne (Whisker) after voiceover fix — original said 'Litter-Robot 5', needed to say 'Litter-Robot 5 Pro'. Liz re-recorded same day. Cheyenne confirmed early next week posting is fine. Scheduling for week of Apr 20.
deals.activity_note: Apr 15: Content approved by Whisker after minor voiceover fix. Liz to post week of Apr 20 — moved to Scheduled.

deals.next_action: Wait for Laura's response on deliverables and paid budget
deals.notes:
[Apr 15]: Liz replied to Laura — asked about collaboration goals, deliverables, usage rights, and whether there's a paid budget. Kenny cc'd. Waiting on response.
[Apr 14]: Laura from xTool (Makeblock) reached out about gifted collab — xTool P3 80W CO2 laser system (~$10K product value). DIY/home decor/small business angle. Cuts 20mm basswood, 25mm acrylic in single pass. Brand has 1M+ creators globally, featured in CNET.
deals.activity_note: Apr 14/15: Laura from xTool pitched xTool P3 CO2 laser collab (~$10K product). Liz replied Apr 15 asking about deliverables and whether there's a paid budget. Created deal card — gifted/paid TBD.
